Scaffold a new Nectar project in the current (or given) directory

Usage:
  nectar init [--yes] [--force] [--dir <path>] [--json]

Options:
  -y, --yes           Skip prompts and use defaults (non-interactive)
  --force             Overwrite existing files in the target directory
  --dir <path>        Target directory to scaffold into (defaults to .)
  -j, --json          Emit the scaffold summary (created paths) as JSON on stdout instead of the human "Scaffolded" log
  -h, --help          Show help for this command

Environment variables:
  Every flag has an env var fallback (CLI flag > env var > config > default).
  Naming: NECTAR_<COMMAND>_<FLAG> (uppercased, dashes become underscores).
  Example: --yes → NECTAR_INIT_YES

Examples:
  nectar init                                  # scaffold in the current dir (interactive)
  nectar init --yes                            # accept defaults; CI-friendly
  nectar init --dir my-blog --yes              # scaffold a new project folder
